prerequisites: A Castor EDC account with access to Account Settings, where API client credentials are generated.
An API client registered in Castor EDC to obtain a client_id and client_secret.
Know your account's url_region (one of uk, nl, or us) assigned at registration.
A start_date (date-time in the format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ) to bound incremental syncs.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 client credentials
authMethods.summary: Castor EDC authenticates via the OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant. The connector exchanges the client_id and client_secret for an access token at https://{url_region}.castoredc.com/oauth/token, then uses that token for API requests. Both client_id and client_secret are required secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Create API credentials in Castor EDC
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Castor EDC and open Account Settings at https://YOUR_REGION.castoredc.com/account/settings (replace YOUR_REGION with your region, e.g. uk, nl, or us). Generate an API client to obtain its client_id and client_secret.

setupSteps.title: Set the region
setupSteps.body: Set url_region to the region your account was registered in. Allowed values are uk, nl, and us; the default is uk. This determines the base URL and the OAuth token endpoint (https://{url_region}.castoredc.com/oauth/token).

setupSteps.title: Provide the OAuth credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter the client_id and client_secret from your Castor EDC API client into the connector's secret fields. The connector uses them with the OAuth 2.0 client_credentials grant to obtain an access token automatically.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set start_date to the earliest point from which records should be synced. Use the date-time format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssZ (for example 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z). This bounds incremental sync for supported streams.
